SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.queue

Class QueueItem<T extends Serializable>

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.queue.QueueItem<T>
Type Parameters:
T - payload type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class QueueItem<T extends Serializable> extends Object implements Serializable
Persistent queue item with scheduling and claim metadata.
